## Goal

Give `nsg writ list` a native way to return only top-level writs (those with no parent). The focusing-tool workflow depends on a cheap way to say "show me the roots"; today the only option is listing everything and client-side filtering, or maintaining the top-level list outside the writ substrate. Neither is acceptable as a startup-orientation primitive. Prereq for `w-mo0ffnhw-b2d0d3f7e3fc`.
